content_of_post_to_comment: Hi what should i do? I install screen zen and it works for 1 day and the next day it doesnt limit anything :( i have a feeling its something to do with accessibility but not sure. how to troubleshoot? Thanks
comment: I’ve seen apps with accessibility permissions randomly lose access after updates or battery optimization kicks in. I’d check Settings > Accessibility and make sure Screen Zen is still enabled, then look at battery settings to remove any restrictions. Also curious if it stops working after a phone restart or just randomly during the day?
